utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding keys. Now check if each is fully specified with the required details: The format requires each of the first four to include type and costs; the plan provides a named plan, a monthly_cost value, and descriptive features for each (health, property, travel, additional). For total_budget, the format asks for a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; the plan provides monthly_total and annual_total, plus a comparison with current coverage and savings. All items appear present with costs and descriptions; thus all items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four items: EliteCare Premium Plan (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel), and Premium Insurance Membership (general service). I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings. EliteCare Premium Plan appears under primary_health_coverage physical_health and mental_health with rating 10; since the plan lists comprehensive physical and mental coverage under a single plan name, I map to the EliteCare Premium Plan rating of 10. PrimeHome Premium Coverage is listed under property_protection home_content with rating 10. PrimeTravel Premium Plan is under mobility_coverage travel_insurance with rating 10. Premium Insurance Membership is under general_services with rating 10.
